description: Cross-source reporting, wire details, and diplomatic sources.
facts: Reuters confirmed the specific numbers of drones (32) and ballistic missiles (14) directly from IDF spokespersons.
BBC World Service verified the casualty numbers (3 dead, 47 wounded) through on-the-ground medical contacts.
Associated Press reporters in Beirut note increased aerial activity over southern Lebanon but no direct Hezbollah involvement in this wave.
Al Jazeera diplomatic sources indicate back-channel communications between Washington and Tehran via Oman are currently stalled.
Pentagon briefings maintain that the USS Eisenhower's deployment is defensive, aimed at deterrence.
